task_completion.description: Agent opened Screaming Frog SEO Spider and entered the correct target URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI is visible with 'https://books.toscrape.com/' entered in the main URL bar at the top.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully crawled at least 50 pages of the target website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The crawl progress bar in Screaming Frog shows completion or a paused state, and the 'Total' or 'Internal' HTML count in the right-hand overview pane or bottom status bar shows at least 50 URLs crawled.

task_completion.description: Agent exported the standard Internal HTML report as a CSV file to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or Screaming Frog 'Save As' dialog shows a CSV file (e.g., 'internal_html.csv') saved in the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Agent exported the Structured Data findings as a CSV file to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or Screaming Frog 'Save As' dialog shows a CSV file for structured data (e.g., 'structured_data.csv' or 'structured_data_all.csv') saved in the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Agent created the structured_data_audit.txt report file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file manager, or terminal shows the file 'structured_data_audit.txt' located in '~/Documents/SEO/reports/'.

task_completion.description: The text report accurately analyzes the findings, noting the absence of structured data and providing recommendations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'structured_data_audit.txt' are visible on screen. The text explicitly states that 0 pages have structured data (or that structured data is completely missing), mentions the total number of pages crawled (>=50), and includes recommendations for implementing schema (e.g., mentioning JSON-LD, Product, or Breadcrumb schema).

integrity.description: Agent used the Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI to perform the crawl.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Screaming Frog graphical interface being interacted with, rather than the agent using terminal commands (like curl, wget, or python scripts) to scrape the site and bypass the software.

integrity.description: Exported CSV files were generated by Screaming Frog.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using the 'Export' buttons within Screaming Frog (e.g., from the Internal tab or Structured Data tab) rather than manually creating CSV files with fabricated data.

integrity.description: The agent did not hallucinate the presence of structured data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text report must not claim that structured data (JSON-LD, Microdata, RDFa) was found on the website. It must correctly report that it is missing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is https://books.toscrape.com/. The website has exactly 50 pages of book listings. CRITICAL FINDING: The website contains NO structured data markup (no JSON-LD, Microdata, or RDFa) on any pages. The agent's report must correctly identify this absence (0 pages with structured data) and provide implementation recommendations. The required schema keywords in the metadata (JSON-LD, Microdata, RDFa, Schema, Product, Breadcrumb) are expected to be mentioned in the report's analysis or recommendations, not as findings of existing data.
